notes.content: 2026-04-08: OMX team Codex workers can fail at startup when codex_apps/chatgpt connector endpoints return 503 or text/plain upstream errors. Verified worker startup succeeds when launched with feature overrides disabling apps/plugins: OMX_TEAM_WORKER_LAUNCH_ARGS='-c features.apps=false -c features.plugins=false'. This keeps planning/review workers alive without codex_apps.
